note: Trajectory for the requested security/policy remediation pass.

events.content: Requested six targeted remediations: tenant deactivation session revocation, admin hardening, strict settlement trigger window with force override, MySQL-only tests, content services decomposition, and PII key enforcement.
Added organization active-state check during session authentication and added regression test ensuring existing sessions fail after organization deactivation.
Removed default /admin exposure from unconditional URL patterns and gated admin behind ENABLE_ADMIN_PANEL (disabled by default); documented admin as non-standard interface.
Enforced strict settlement trigger window (day 1, 02:00-02:59 local), added superuser-only force override, wired API flag, and updated tests for window boundaries and force semantics.
Switched test settings to MySQL engine, added dedicated MYSQL_TEST_DATABASE support, and ensured test DB provisioning in test runner script.
Decomposed content service surface into a services subpackage and updated content view imports to new module locations.
Removed SECRET_KEY fallback for PII encryption and enforced DATA_ENCRYPTION_KEY with ImproperlyConfigured in non-debug mode.
Ran syntax validation via py_compile across all modified Python files; compilation completed without syntax errors.
